excerpt: The official programme page for MA in Sustainable Fashion and Innovation lists Early round opening on 2026-07-02 and closing on 2026-10-20. Source: https://www.polyu.edu.hk/study/pg/tpg/2027/14107-ffs-pfs Local Application Deadline: 20 Oct 2026 (Early Round) Non-Local Application Deadline: 20 Oct 2026 (Early Round)
matchedTextBefore: This programme is offered in full-time mode (stream code: FFS) and part-time mode (stream code: PFS). Applicants are requested to specify the appropriate stream code in their online application.
